M-Scale ROAS/Value Bid





This is a pretty awesome addition from Facebook to bid for a combination of higher AOV and lower CPA by targeting a better ROAS (the first option in the screen above) - you need to have multiple purchase values sent through to use this.

In practice I’ve found using Highest value/lowest cost combo to work best, so I don’t manual bid here as there are 2 variables Facebook is balancing (cart value and acquisition cost). That said, it’s worth testing against manual bid and lowest cost auto bidding.

I’d follow the same testing as COST CAP - setting my ROAS ranges around my target +/- 25% and trying to get as strong a ROAS as I can, together with good volume. Just because you bid for 10X ROAS doesn’t mean you’ll get it!

This best works when implementing the testing path I’ve explained in this guide together with a strong CORE-4.



That concludes M-Scale with the various options - as noted earlier, I prefer using BID CAP with CBO when I use it. Test the above and find the best method for your account and report back!
